creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 176819
Patch to the ports tree

The attached patch updates devel/visualparadigm to 13.2 build 20161101.

The upstream project doesn't provide information for minor updates.

- Q/A
 * portlint -AC OK
 * port test OK
 * poudriere builds for {9.3,10.1,10.2,10.3,11.0}{i386,amd64} OK (logs available on request)
